description.content: Access and query call detail records

item.name: Cisco Voice Portal Query Call Detail Records

request.name: Cisco Voice Portal Query Call Detail Records

description.content: Retrieves call detail records (CDRs) based on specified filter criteria. CDRs contain comprehensive information about each call processed by CVP including timing, routing decisions, application interactions, and outcome.

response.name: Call detail records matching the query

Hostname or IP of the CVP Reporting Server

The Cisco Unified Customer Voice Portal (CVP) Reporting API provides access to call detail records (CDRs), real-time call statistics, and historical reporting data. The Reporting Server collects data from CVP Call Servers and VXML Servers, storing it in the CVP Reporting Database (an Informix database). This API provides RESTful access to reporting data that is typically accessed via the Cisco Unified Intelligence Center (CUIC) reporting interface.
